_notes.rpc_url: Public X1 RPC. Use your own node for higher rate limits.
_notes.wallet_address: Your main wallet public key (never put private keys here).
_notes.validator_identity: Your validator identity pubkey (node public key, not vote account).
_notes.treasury_address: x1scroll.io treasury wallet for escrow verification.
_notes.api_key: Optional — for external APIs that require authentication.
_notes.alert_threshold_disk: Disk usage % to trigger alerts (85 = alert at 85% full).
_notes.alert_threshold_xnt: XNT balance threshold for low-gas warnings (0.1 XNT).
